name: Ring of the Ram
description:
This ring has 3 charges and regains {@dice 1d3} expended charges daily at dawn. While wearing the ring, you can take a {@action Magic|XPHB} action to expend 1 to 3 charges to make a ranged spell attack against one creature you can see within 60 feet of yourself. The ring produces a spectral ram's head and makes its attack roll with a +7 bonus. On a hit, for each charge you spend, the target takes {@damage 2d10} Force damage and is pushed 5 feet away from you.
